---
title: "`r params$study` FASTA report"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: false
params:
  study: "LYL273"
  version: !r '{ f <- list.files(pattern="^FASTA*\\.R$")[1]; iso <- gsub("[._]","",f); regmatches(iso, regexpr("\\d+", iso)) }'
  fcs_dir: "."           # root to scan for input FCS files
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{array}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{longtable}
  - \usepackage{colortbl}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{placeins}
  - \usepackage{titlesec}
  - \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{0pt}{4pt}
  - \AtBeginDocument{\hypersetup{bookmarksopen=true,bookmarksopenlevel=1}}
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \usepackage{lastpage}
  - \setlength{\headheight}{14pt}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhf{}
  - \fancyhead[L]{\small `r params$study` FASTA Report}
  - \fancyhead[R]{\small\itshape Developed by Lyell-SSF-Flowcore}
  - \fancyfoot[C]{\small Page \thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}}
  - \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
  - \fancypagestyle{plain}{\fancyhf{}\fancyfoot[C]{\small Page \thepage\ of \pageref{LastPage}}\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}}
classoption: landscape
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
colorlinks: true

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
  f<- list.files(pattern = "^FASTA*\\.R$")[1]
  iso<- gsub("[._]", "", f)                       
  scriptName<- regmatches(iso, regexpr("^\\D+", iso))
  scriptVer<- regmatches(iso, regexpr("\\d+",  iso)) 
  options(knitr.table.format = "latex")
  knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev = "ragg_png", dpi = 300)
  if (!requireNamespace("purrr", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("purrr")
  library(purrr)
  knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("."))
  ScriptFile   <- grep("ExtFunctions",
                         grep("FASTA", list.files(pattern=".*\\.R$"), value=TRUE),
                         value=TRUE, invert=TRUE)
  listOfFunctions<-c(ScriptFile)
  knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("."))
  walk(listOfFunctions, source, local = knitr::knit_global())
```

```{=tex}
\FloatBarrier
\newpage
```

# Gating Scheme

```{r GatingPlot, fig.width=12, fig.height=8, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
    plot(gs,boolean=TRUE)
```

```{=tex}
\FloatBarrier
\newpage
```

# Data Summary

```{r summaryPlot1, fig.width=15, fig.height=11, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
##  plot(SummaryPlot1)
```

```{r summaryPlot2, fig.width=15, fig.height=11, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
 ## plot(SummaryPlot2)
```

```{r summaryPlot3, fig.width=15, fig.height=11, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
##plot(SummaryPlot3)
```

```{=tex}
\FloatBarrier
\newpage
```

# Panel QC

```{r Panel QC, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
  cat("**Panel Inventory:**", PanelMasterInventoryLocation, "\n\n")
  cat("**Panel Iteration:**", PanelIteration, "\n\n")
  
  pqc <- panel_QC(gs, PanelMasterInventoryLocation, PanelIteration)
  if (nrow(pqc) == 0) {
    cat("**Panel as expected** — all markers verified.\n")
  } else {
    print(knitr::kable(pqc, format="latex", booktabs=TRUE,
                       caption=paste("Panel QC:", knitr:::escape_latex(PanelIteration))) |>
      kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size=8,
                                 latex_options=c("hold_position","scale_down")))
  }
```

```{=tex}
\FloatBarrier
\newpage
```

# Gating QC

```{r Gating QC, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
  check_labels <- c(
    population_missing                = "Missing Populations",
    active_gate_false_present         = "Disabled Gates Still Present",
    parent_path_mismatch              = "Parent Path Mismatch",
    gate_logic_component_missing      = "gate_logic: Missing Components",
    identical_threshold_all_samples   = "Identical Threshold (All Samples)",
    identical_threshold_across_groups = "Identical Threshold Across Groups",
    within_group_threshold_variation  = "Within-Group Threshold Variation",
    threshold_outside_data_range      = "Threshold Outside Data Range",
    quadrant_children_sum_mismatch    = "Quadrant Children Sum Mismatch",
    gate_logic_count_mismatch         = "gate_logic Count Mismatch",
    empty_population                  = "Empty Populations",
    low_parent_events                 = "Low Parent Event Count"
  )
  
  for (nm in names(tbls)[names(tbls) %in% names(check_labels)]) {
    cat("\n\n###", check_labels[nm], "\n\n")
    df <- tbls[[nm]]
    df$check <- NULL
    print(
      knitr::kable(df, format="latex", booktabs=TRUE, longtable=TRUE) |>
      kable_styling(latex_options=c("hold_position","repeat_header"), font_size=8,
                    repeat_header_continued=TRUE) |>
      column_spec(2, width="6cm")
    )
    cat("\n\n\\FloatBarrier\n\n")  # ← flush floats before next header
  }
```

```{=tex}
\FloatBarrier
\newpage
```

# Layouts

```{r layoutPlots, fig.width=12, fig.height=8, fig.pos="H", echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
stopifnot("label" %in% colnames(pData(gs)))
for (i in seq_along(gs)) {
  lbl <- pData(gs)$label[i]
  cat("\n\\clearpage\n\\subsection{\\small", knitr:::escape_latex(lbl), "}\n\n")
  first <- TRUE
  for (layout_nm in c("layout_1","layout_2","layout_3")) {
    if (!is.null(plot_list[[i]][[layout_nm]])) {
      if (!first) cat("\n\\newpage\n")
      print(plot_list[[i]][[layout_nm]])
      first <- FALSE
    }
  }
}
```

```{=tex}
\FloatBarrier
\newpage
```

# Session Information

```{r provenance, echo=FALSE, results='asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
cat("**Script version:** ", scriptName, " v", scriptVer, "\n\n", sep="")
fcs <- list.files(path = params$fcs_dir, pattern = "\\.fcs$",
                  recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

cat("**Render timestamp:** ", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z"), "\n\n", sep="")
cat("**Rendered by:** ", Sys.info()[["user"]], " on ", Sys.info()[["nodename"]], "\n\n", sep="")
cat("**Panel inventory:** ", PanelMasterInventoryLocation, " (", PanelIteration, ")\n\n", sep="")
if (length(fcs)) {
  md5 <- tools::md5sum(fcs)
  print(knitr::kable(data.frame(File=basename(names(md5)), MD5=unname(md5)),
                     format="latex", booktabs=TRUE,
                     caption="Input file checksums") |>
        kableExtra::kable_styling(font_size=7, latex_options=c("hold_position","scale_down")))
}
```

```{r sessionInfo, echo=FALSE}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
